feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Conflict of Interest
entry.summary:
Author: BlackLynx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,672Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 16

Summary: A reimagined first meeting between Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne during their early days as Superman and Batman. Following Clark's perspective, this story follows Clark and Bruce's search for companionship as they develop their identities as Batman and Superman, struggling to find balance and let each other in. It is funny, angsty, smutty, hopeful, and features a happy ending. The first chapter features Lois Lane and Clark being best friends, Bruce being a bit cocky and forward, Zatanna as Bruce's beard, a dazzling Gala, some heroics, and a quickly resolved misunderstanding.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The New Son of Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Sally_Boomer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,002Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Superman whipped the condensation on the healing-vessel window with a shaky hand, the oppression on his chest only growing more overwhelming the more he cleared the view. Then he saw it. There, floating in the fluid, was a foetus. “Kelex.” Kal’s voice came broken and strangled, and a little hysterical, “Kelex, what is inside?” “A Kryptonian-human, Kal-El.” Replied the AI, “A descendant designed to better adapt to the planet chosen to board the House of El. A new type of Kryptonian for a new planet.” “A hybrid for…” Started Kal, only to stop mid-sentence, suddenly assaulted by a dreadful realisation. “Which human? Whose DNA did you take for this? From whom did you take the human sample?” “Your chosen mate, Kal-El. Batman.” Kelex answered without pause, as if the answer was obvious. ---- Superman, who has been secretly in love with his best friend for over a decade, accidentally baby traps Batman with a human-kryptonian child. Or Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne are Conner Wayne's biological parents, and they may or may not fall in love while raising their child together.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: We Could Be Heroes - A SuperBat Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 127,293Chapters: 44/?Kudos: 395

Summary: "I’ve made a lot of mistakes in my life, and for a long time, I thought I’d continue to fall into darkness. But Clark is like a shining light. He inspires me to be a better person.” Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent both maintain a strong sense of justice and fight for peace in their respective cities. However, both are struggling to maintain order alone, and are weighed down by a lost sense of identity and the loneliness that stems from the isolation of living a double life. After a chance encounter, the pair agree to form a Justice League to address the growing threat to Earth's security. As they learn to work together, new feelings blossom, and the heroes soon find themselves leaning on each other for support and comfort. Slow-burn romance. Bat-family drama. Justice League shenanigans. Bruce being a rich kid with issues. Superman being an innocent lad. Your favorite black cat/golden retriever boys are in for a wild ride.

entry.title: Buried
entry.summary:
Author: RenaiRin

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,406Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 9

Summary: It was the same dream Clark had nonstop ever since he came back from the dead. Same, but different. Sometimes they were in the ruins of Gotham, the islands half-sunk underneath massive, thick, weaving dead branches and sporting a new jagged edge where the sea and the ports used to be that now toppled into a ragged cliff to dry chasms below. Sometimes they were in the cave, under the lake house, now that Clark knew where it was. Sometimes they were standing on the Gotham rooftops in the pouring rain, the clouded sky and darkness from the streets below snuffing out the gaslights that stubbornly remained this side of the Narrows, the black clinging to their bodies like ink. The scenery changed. What came next did not. ______ Or, Clark has recurring nightmares of non-conning Bruce post-resurrection, and Bruce offers CNC with himself as the solution.

entry.title: Spiders and Bats Come From the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: Zoveezz

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,052Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 239

Summary: Two years after being erased by the spell, twenty-one-year-old Peter Parker is pulled out of nowhere into another universe, Gotham. Now he has to find a way back to his own, no matter the cost. After a while, he thinks that maybe with the help of these bats he can get back home. ¿Why does he keep feeling like he's already there? ¿And why does Jason keep showing up at his mechanic job on his broken motorcycle?   ------- At twenty, Jason became Red Hood; now, at twenty-two, he still is. He no longer gets along badly with his stupid vigilante family, but he's not comfortable neither. Maybe because that feeling of loneliness, of isolation, is always there, with the rage. He's stressed out with a difficult case when he meets Peter, whom, for some reason, Jason can't stop staring at. And then there was that idiot Spider-Man who was hanging around in his neighborhood.

entry.title: Face My Fears
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,810Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 3,663

Summary: During what Red Hood thought was just a routine check of all of the warehouses in his territory, making sure no new gang was going to start a gang war, he stumbles upon a scene that would haunt his nightmares. A Death Cult about to sacrifice a child that could be no older than 4. After dealing with the cult members, Jason finds himself the new caretaker of a 4 year old toddler that also happens to be able to turn invisible when startled. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: TheCrimsonCritic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,576Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 35

Summary: "As if the man could sense Bruce’s ogling, Clark looked directly at him as the bull jerked particularly hard, sending the reporter’s back into a sinuous arch. Bruce was a man who had a turbulent “relationship” with Clark, but he was still just a man. A man who wanted the reporter-turned-mechanical-bull rider. Bad." OR Bruce sees Clark ride a mechanical bull at a themed gala wants Clark's cookie BAD. Before AND after discovering Clark's identity as Superman.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,332Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 48

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: Family maybe?
entry.summary:
Author: E_fox_lady53799armor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 929Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: Summary : After a long time searching about his biological family Jason Todd finds out that he has a cousin. And as if that weren’t enough he is supposed to be the kid that now got adopted by a Bruce.But something doesn’t add up. His scars. His movements, like he had to fight his entire life. And worst of all his eyes. They look like they have seen centuries but also like a calm water but too calm .———Percy Jackson two wars veteran trying to live his life after his mother’s death. But one day he meets a man that looks a lot like him but older and less divine (like Poseidon), but if he took those things aside… no that man can’t be..but..no..his father Poseidon had warned him that he might meet him, but he never thought it was possible… too much similarities!!!

entry.title: and when i'm gone, just carry on, don't mourn, rejoice
entry.summary:
Author: dwarflover4life

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,108Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 67

Summary: He wanted to end it – had thought about doing it since his parents had passed when he was just an eight-year-old boy – but he couldn’t. When he felt this way he often thought of his oldest son, Dick, and his butler Alfred. And Clark. And that’s why he’s decided to draft up a new will and a contingency plan of sorts. He already had many in place, but this would be the final one – he needed to make it count. So that when he ended it all, everything would go smoothly, and they could all forget about Bruce and finally be happy. It was the perfect solution. Everything could be fixed with a plan. At the start of January in the new year he would be a dead man.   (title inspired by 'When I'm Gone' by Eminem)

entry.title: There's No I In Threesome
entry.summary:
Author: Brenda

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,816Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: The problem with trying to negotiate a potential relationship between three very busy and very disparate people is getting them in the same place at the same time for a conversation. (AKA, the three (3) times Lois and Clark and Bruce all try - and fail - to have a discussion about what they all want from each other, and the one (1) time they decide talking is overrated.)

entry.title: The Alien Bird
entry.summary:
Author: EJ_Rambles

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,305Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Damian sat cross legged on the chimney of the abandoned factory, eyes scanning over his city as the sun slowly rose. Bludhaven was…it was. entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Nat_isguiltyassin

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,516Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 39

Summary: In the afterlife, you have to pick who you’ll spend eternity with. Clark ends up stuck between Lois, his ex-wife, the love he lost young, and Bruce, his current husband, the father of his kids, who has been by his side for more than 65 years. Who will Clark choose? This is basically the Eternity movie but superbat.

Author: aloserkid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,881Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: Bruce Wayne agrees to appear on the Daily Planet's new baking show if, and only if, Clark Kent is his cohost.Clark Kent thinks that, if Bruce Wayne isn't trying to fuck him, he's probably trying to kill him.

entry.title: Need a Hand
entry.summary:
Author: Lord_Kakarot

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 938Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: In the Batcave, Superman seeks solace from Batman after relationship troubles with Lois, leading to an intimate encounter where Bruce uses a specialized machine and his own hands to relieve a pent-up Clark. The night ends with Clark offering future favors in exchange for more sessions, strengthening their unique bond over a shared meal.
